description: §16.2 Workflow-tier dashboard 4/5 — End-to-end LLM pipeline health. Aggregates the orchestrator's per-call metrics (FastAPI metrics.py) into a single executive view of the RAG pipeline's runtime characteristics.

panels.title: LLM calls/min by backend
panels.description: Per-backend call rate. vllm = local Qwen3, anthropic = failover path. Sustained anthropic > 5% of total = vllm is unstable or LLM_BACKEND_FALLBACK is overactive.

panels.title: Cache hit rate by backend (%)
panels.description: prompt_cache_tokens_total / prompt_total_tokens_total. Healthy vLLM with --enable-prefix-caching: 60-90%. Anthropic with cache_control: 30-80% (lower because the system prompt isn't always cached across project switches).

panels.title: LLM calls per query (histogram)
panels.description: metrics.py LLM_CALLS_PER_QUERY. One query budget = MAX_LLM_CALLS_PER_QUERY (default 8). p50 should be 1-2 (primary + classifier); p95 covers retries; p99 catches the validation-fail-then-failover path.

panels.title: Failovers (req/s, by tier+exception)
panels.description: metrics.py FAILOVERS — broken out by from_tier/to_tier/exception_class. 429s + 529s are upstream rate-limit / overload. Persistent timeouts = the OpenAI-compat endpoint is slow.

panels.title: Partial tool-failure rate by tool (req/s)
panels.description: metrics.py PARTIAL_TOOL_FAILURES — the parallel_branches block's per-store timeout / error escape hatch. Any single store > 0 sustained means it's degraded.

panels.title: Chunks returned per query (histogram)
panels.description: metrics.py CHUNKS_RETURNED — Qdrant document chunks surviving the relevance threshold + reranker. p50 typically 3-6; p95 8-12. Sustained p50 near 0 = the document corpus is sparse or RETRIEVAL_QUALITY_THRESHOLD is too tight.

panels.title: LLM call budget exhaustions (24h)
panels.description: metrics.py LLM_CALL_BUDGET_EXCEEDED — queries that hit MAX_LLM_CALLS_PER_QUERY and were aborted. Should be 0. Sustained > 0 means an upstream loop is firing (typically a validation-fail retry storm).

panels.title: Output tokens/min
panels.description: metrics.py LLM_TOKENS_OUTPUT — sustained output token rate across all models. Useful for capacity planning vs. GPU saturation.

title: GeoRAG — Workflows (LLM pipeline)
